title: Workflow or Automation for Monday Dev Sprints
excerpt: I am using Monday Dev for my team, and I want to be able to auto assign items to a sprint based on the due date or a date column. I have look but can’t seem to fine a way to do that within the beta workflow or automation…

posts.author: BrianZ (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using Monday Dev for my team, and I want to be able to auto assign items to a sprint based on the due date or a date column. I have look but can’t seem to fine a way to do that within the beta workflow or automations.
